Election.title: BV2134 — Pets Governance: six positions, six methods
Election.description: One 22-voter electorate — a 13-voter Furry majority (Dog, Cat, Fish) and a 9-voter Others minority (Bird, Rabbit, Hamster) — elects a pet government six ways, contrasting majoritarian and proportional multi-winner methods. Council by Bloc STAR sweeps all three seats for the majority (Dog, Fish, Cat); Council by STAR-PR and Delegates by STV seat the minority (Bird); Committee by Approval is majoritarian (Dog, Cat); Mayor by Ranked Robin is the Condorcet winner (Dog); Neighborhood Reps by Bloc Plurality / SNTV seat one of each (Dog, Bird). Winners are the LH prediction, to be cross-checked against BetterVoting.

races.title: Neighborhood Reps — Bloc Plurality / SNTV (2 seats)

logs: 3 winners will represent 22 voters, so winners will need to represent a quota of 7.33 voters each.
Dog is scored highest with 65 stars and is elected!
The 13 voters who gave Dog 5 stars are partially represented. 56% of their remaining vote will go toward Dog and 44% will be preserved for future rounds.
Bird is scored highest with 50.67 stars and is elected!
The 9 voters who gave Bird 5 stars are partially represented. 81% of their remaining vote will go toward Bird and 19% will be preserved for future rounds.
Fish is scored highest with 24.33 stars and is elected!
The 5.67 voters who gave Fish more than 0.19 stars are fully represented and will be removed from future rounds.
The 1.67 voters who gave Fish 0.19 stars are partially represented. 100% of their remaining vote will go toward Fish and 0% will be preserved for future rounds.
Dog, Cat, and Fish all tied with the most approvals
Dog wins the round after a random tiebreaker
Cat and Fish all tied with the most approvals
Cat wins the round after a random tiebreaker
Dog wins round with highest number of wins.
Dog has the most votes and wins the round
Bird has the most votes and wins the round
